headerTitle: Software Engineer  ·  Better Planet  ·  Mission-Driven Tech
intro: I build product-complete systems end to end — from data ingestion and API design through UI and deployment — which makes me effective in lean, mission-focused environments where generalism and ownership matter more than headcount. Better Planet's model of shipping real climate impact through software is exactly the kind of high-leverage work I want to apply that to.
bullets: Full-Stack Ownership — Solo-shipped multiple SaaS products (Next.js, Node.js, Postgres, Docker) from zero to live users — including auth, billing hooks, admin tooling, and analytics — the full surface area a mid-size engineering team would distribute across 3-4 engineers.

Data Systems — Built property data pipelines pulling from county appraisal districts, geospatial APIs, and enrichment services — ingestion, dedup, storage, and queryable admin UI — directly applicable to environmental or impact data workflows.

Pragmatic and Adaptable — Delivered across React, Python, PostgreSQL, REST and real-time WebSocket APIs; I learn the stack a role needs, not just the one I shipped last — ready to contribute in week one.
matchNotes: Strong generalist fit; domain (climate/sustainability) is new but engineering profile aligns well
